titles.title: I've Got a River of Life

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've got a river of life flowing out of me! Makes the lame to walk, and the blind to see. Opens prison doors, sets the captives free! I've got a river of life flowing out of me!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Spring up, O well, within my soul! Spring up, O well, and make me whole! Spring up, O well, and give to me That life abundantly.
